trading.name: Trading Mastery
trading.description: Skills that improve your trading efficiency and market knowledge.

skills.name: Negotiator
skills.description: -2% purchase price per level

skills.name: Market Eye
skills.description: See price trend details at current system

skills.name: Bulk Trader
skills.description: -5% price when buying 10+ units per level

skills.name: Trade Network
skills.description: +10% sell price at high-rep systems per level

skills.name: Market Insider
skills.description: See price info for remote systems

skills.name: Commodity Specialist
skills.description: +5% sell price on specialty goods per level

skills.name: Market Manipulation
skills.description: Player buy/sell has 50% less price impact per level

skills.name: Smuggler Contacts
skills.description: -10% off-market sell penalty per level

skills.name: Supply Chain Mastery
skills.description: -10% price variance at visited systems per level

skills.name: Trade Magnate
skills.description: All buy/sell bonuses doubled at systems where you are ALLIED

gathering.name: Resource Gathering
gathering.description: Skills that improve mining, salvaging, and resource extraction.

skills.name: Efficient Drills
skills.description: -15% drill time per level

skills.name: Keen Scanner
skills.description: +1 scan charge per level

skills.name: Rich Veins
skills.description: +25% rare ore chance per level

skills.name: Master Extractor
skills.description: -20% extraction time per level

skills.name: Refining Knowledge
skills.description: Unlocks advanced refining recipes

skills.name: Efficient Refining
skills.description: -10% refining time per level

skills.name: Yield Mastery
skills.description: +10% all gathering yields per level

skills.name: Master Prospector
skills.description: Guaranteed rare resource on every 3rd extraction

mining.name: Mining Mastery
mining.description: Skills that improve click mining, drones, and ore yields.

skills.name: Click Power
skills.description: +25% click drill power per level

skills.name: Passive Drill
skills.description: +10% passive drill speed per level

skills.name: Deep Scan
skills.description: +50% rare ore chance in mining fields per level

skills.name: Drone Bay I
skills.description: Unlocks 1 drone slot and grants a Tier 1 drone

skills.name: Drone Bay II
skills.description: Unlocks 2nd drone slot and grants a Tier 2 drone

skills.name: Drone Bay III
skills.description: Unlocks 3rd drone slot and grants a Tier 3 drone

skills.name: Drone Efficiency
skills.description: +20% drone mining speed per level

skills.name: Ore Targeting
skills.description: Drones can be set to prefer specific ore types

skills.name: Chain Reaction
skills.description: +15% chance adjacent cells break on drill per level

skills.name: Pressure Venting
skills.description: -15% overheat penalty per level

skills.name: Strip Miner
skills.description: Drones extract all visible resources when mining session ends

leadership.name: Leadership & Operations
leadership.description: Skills that improve crew management, diplomacy, and faction relations.

skills.name: Crew Manager
skills.description: +1 crew slot

skills.name: Diplomatic Relations
skills.description: +1 reputation per trade per level

skills.name: Inspiring Leader
skills.description: +1 crew loyalty per trade per level

skills.name: Tariff Negotiation
skills.description: -5% faction tariff per level

skills.name: Crew Mentor
skills.description: +2 crew XP per event per level

skills.name: Fleet Coordinator
skills.description: +10% crew task effectiveness per level

skills.name: Crisis Management
skills.description: -5% hull damage taken per level

skills.name: Veteran Command
skills.description: +2% XP gain from all sources per level

skills.name: Morale Officer
skills.description: +5% crew skill effectiveness per level

skills.name: Legendary Captain
skills.description: +2 crew slots; crew loyalty never decays

social.name: Social & Influence
social.description: Skills that improve social interactions, persuasion, and faction diplomacy.

skills.name: Silver Tongue
skills.description: +1 Persuasion level per level

skills.name: Commanding Presence
skills.description: +1 Intimidation level per level

skills.name: Keen Insight
skills.description: +1 Observation level per level

skills.name: Master Negotiator
skills.description: Unlock special dialogue options in negotiations

skills.name: Streetwise
skills.description: +1 to black market checks per level

skills.name: Empathic Read
skills.description: See NPC disposition during dialogue

skills.name: Silver Lining
skills.description: +10% better random encounter outcomes per level

skills.name: Faction Diplomat
skills.description: +1 faction rep per diplomatic action per level

skills.name: Cultural Savant
skills.description: +1 to all social checks in faction-aligned systems per level

skills.name: Voice of the Expanse
skills.description: Unlock unique peaceful resolutions to any hostile encounter

ground.name: Ground Combat
ground.description: Skills that improve ground mission combat effectiveness and survival.

skills.name: Scrapper
skills.description: +1 to ground attack rolls per level

skills.name: Tough Hide
skills.description: +2 max HP on ground missions per level

skills.name: Quick Reflexes
skills.description: +1 re-roll per ground combat per level

skills.name: Intimidating Presence
skills.description: First exchange: enemy rolls at -2 per level

skills.name: Last Stand
skills.description: Below 25% HP: +3 to all rolls per level

skills.name: Field Medic
skills.description: +1 HP healed between ground encounters per level

skills.name: Terrain Reader
skills.description: Preview enemy stats before engaging

skills.name: Adaptive Fighter
skills.description: +1 attack per consecutive hit in same combat per level

skills.name: Combat Scavenger
skills.description: +15% ground loot quality per level

skills.name: Veteran
skills.description: +1 re-roll per combat, +1 max HP

skills.name: Battle-Hardened
skills.description: Start ground missions at full HP; +2 to all rolls on first exchange

combat.name: Combat & Tactics
combat.description: Skills that improve ship combat, weapons, and defensive systems.

skills.name: Weapons Training
skills.description: +5% weapon damage per level

skills.name: Evasive Maneuvers
skills.description: +5% dodge chance per level

skills.name: Shield Mastery
skills.description: +10% shield effectiveness per level

skills.name: Precision Targeting
skills.description: +5% critical hit chance per level

skills.name: Tactical Retreat
skills.description: +10% flee chance per level

skills.name: Broadside
skills.description: +15% damage with heavy weapons per level

skills.name: Combat Veteran
skills.description: +10% combat XP per level

skills.name: Rapid Fire
skills.description: +10% attack speed per level

skills.name: Hull Reinforcement
skills.description: +5% max hull HP per level

skills.name: Ace Pilot
skills.description: First round of combat: double damage, double dodge chance

skills.name: Armor Expertise
skills.description: +1 armor per level

skills.name: Last Stand Mastery
skills.description: Last Stand triggers at +5% higher hull, +5% bonus damage per level

skills.name: Field Repairs
skills.description: -15% repair costs per level

skills.name: Endurance
skills.description: +3% hull damage reduction per level

skills.name: Juggernaut
skills.description: When hull > 75%: immune to crits. When hull < 25%: +25% damage

skills.name: Shield Regeneration
skills.description: +2 shield regen per turn per level

skills.name: Overcharge Capacity
skills.description: +25% max shield overflow per level

skills.name: Shield Discipline
skills.description: Shield break vulnerability reduced by 10% per level

skills.name: Energy Shields
skills.description: Shield restore moves cost 1 less energy per level

skills.name: Sentinel
skills.description: Shields regen double when above 50%. Shield break restores 20% shields

skills.name: Afterburner
skills.description: +5 evasion, +5% flee chance per level

skills.name: Counterstrike Mastery
skills.description: Counterstrike bonus +5% per level, max stacks +1 per level

skills.name: Light Foot
skills.description: Level 1: no evasion decay after hit. Level 2: graze damage reduced to 20%

skills.name: Slippery
skills.description: +10% flee chance, +5% encounter avoidance per level

skills.name: Ghost
skills.description: First combat turn: +30 evasion. If not hit in a round: next attack is guaranteed crit

skills.name: Burn Specialist
skills.description: +20% Burn damage per level

skills.name: Ion Overcharge
skills.description: Ion weapons drain 2 enemy energy on hit per level

skills.name: Deep Freeze
skills.description: Chill stacks last +1 turn per level

skills.name: Suppression Expert
skills.description: Suppressed stacks last +1 turn per level

skills.name: Elemental Versatility
skills.description: All elemental status effects gain +1 max stack

exploration.name: Exploration & Piloting
exploration.description: Skills that improve navigation, fuel efficiency, and discovery.

skills.name: Fuel Efficiency
skills.description: -5% fuel consumption per level

skills.name: Stellar Cartography
skills.description: Reveal additional map info per level

skills.name: Hazard Scanner
skills.description: -10% travel event danger per level

skills.name: Long Range Scanner
skills.description: +1 system scan range per level

skills.name: Efficient Routing
skills.description: -5% travel time per level

skills.name: Salvage Instinct
skills.description: +15% salvage yield per level

skills.name: Explorer Reputation
skills.description: +1 rep with frontier systems per level

skills.name: Anomaly Detector
skills.description: +10% chance to discover hidden events per level

skills.name: Field Repairs
skills.description: Restore 5% hull between jumps per level

skills.name: Trailblazer
skills.description: First visit to any system grants bonus XP and reveals all prices

smuggling.name: Smuggling & Subterfuge
smuggling.description: Skills that improve contraband handling, evasion, and black market access.

skills.name: Hidden Compartments
skills.description: +2 contraband cargo slots per level

skills.name: Bribe Mastery
skills.description: -15% bribe cost per level

skills.name: Scan Jamming
skills.description: -10% detection chance per level

skills.name: Black Market Access
skills.description: +10% contraband sell price per level

skills.name: Heat Management
skills.description: -10% criminal heat gain per level

skills.name: Ghost Runner
skills.description: Maximum evasion: -25% detection, -25% heat gain

skills.name: False Manifest
skills.description: Contraband appears as legal cargo to basic scans per level

skills.name: Underworld Reputation
skills.description: +10% contraband buy discount per level

skills.name: Phantom
skills.description: Criminal heat decays 50% faster; bribes always succeed
